name: Lombarda China Fund Management - Sino European Innovates Closed Mixed 18m Cny Fund
summary: Lombarda China Fund Management - Sino European Innovates Closed Mixed 18m Cny Fund is a fund managed by Lombarda China Fund Management that invests in a mix of stocks and bonds with a focus on Sino-European innovation and a closed-end structure for 18 months, and is denominated in Chinese Yuan (CNY). The fund aims to achieve capital appreciation while managing risk through diversification and a strategic investment approach.
